Gollek SDK Documentation

Install Blog GitHub

Gollek SDK Documentation

Welcome to the Gollek SDK documentation. Choose a path below to get started building AI/ML applications in Java.

🚀 Latest: SDK v0.2 Release

**Advanced Tensor Operations Vision Transforms NLP Tokenizers Complete Examples**

📖 View v0.2 Release Notes

🎯 Platform Overview

Complete Platform Roadmap (9 Phases)

The Wayang Platform spans 9 phases of development:

  1. Phases 1-3: Deep Learning Foundation (Gollek SDK) - 1 Complete ✅, 2 Designed, 3 Designed
  2. Phases 4-7: Agent Framework (Wayang Runtime) - All 4 Complete ✅
  3. Phases 8-9: Production Hardening - All 3 Complete ✅ (8, 8B, 9), 1 Designed (9B)

Start Your Journey:

  • 📊 Platform Phases Overview - Complete roadmap of all 9 phases
  • 🤖 Wayang Agent Framework (Phases 4-7) - Build intelligent agents
  • 🚀 Production Hardening (Phases 8-9) - Deploy to production
  • ⚡ GPU Acceleration (Phase 2) - 30-100x speedup
  • 🔧 Extended Features (Phase 3) - Transformers, model zoo, and more

Getting Started

New Users

  1. Platform Overview - Understand the complete system
  2. Quick Start Guide - Install and set up Gollek in 5 minutes
  3. Your First Model - Build a simple neural network
  4. MNIST Training Example - Complete end-to-end training workflow

Building Agents (Wayang)

  1. Agent Framework Intro - Overview of Phases 4-7
  2. Building Your First Agent - Create agent with builder pattern
  3. Skills Integration - Register and manage skills
  4. Production Deployment - Deploy agents safely

Migrating from PyTorch

  1. PyTorch to Gollek - Mapping PyTorch APIs to Gollek
  2. Common Patterns - Torch patterns in Java
  3. Examples - PyTorch→Gollek code comparisons

Core Documentation

🌟 Wayang Platform (Complete System)

Section Description Status
Platform Phases Overview Complete 9-phase roadmap with status 📊 Complete
Agent Framework (Phases 4-7) Intelligent agent runtime and skills ✅ Production Ready
Production Hardening (Phases 8-9) Observability, optimization, testing ✅ Production Ready
GPU Acceleration (Phase 2) CUDA, Metal, ROCm backends 📋 Designed
Extended Features (Phase 3) Transformers, loss functions, model zoo 📋 Designed

Framework & Training

Document Description
Framework Overview Introduction to Gollek’s ML framework
Tensor API Core Tensor class and operations
GradTensor & Autograd Automatic differentiation
Neural Networks 118+ built-in layer implementations
Training Loop Building training scripts
Optimizers SGD, Adam, RMSprop, etc.
LR Schedulers StepLR, CosineAnnealingLR, etc.

ML/DL/NN Framework API REferences

Version Description Status
0.1.0-SNAPSHOT Modern ML/DL/NN framework modules reference 📚 Available

Advanced Tensor Operations ⭐ NEW

Document Description
TensorOps API Advanced slicing, gathering, masking
Tensor Indexing Multi-dimensional indexing patterns
Reshape & Transpose Tensor shape manipulation
Broadcasting Numpy-style broadcasting rules

Data Loading & Preprocessing

Document Description
DataLoader Efficient data loading
Datasets Built-in dataset implementations
Vision Transforms Image preprocessing pipeline ⭐ NEW
Data Augmentation Mixup, CutMix, RandomCrop, etc.

NLP & Tokenization ⭐ NEW

Document Description
Tokenizer API Text tokenization interface
NLP Layers Embeddings, Attention, etc.
Transformers Transformer architecture building blocks
Language Models Training language models

Computer Vision

Document Description
Vision Layers Conv2d, MaxPool, etc.
CNN Architectures ResNet, VGG, etc. examples
Image Classification End-to-end image classification
Object Detection YOLO-style detection

Model Export & Deployment

Document Description
Model Saving Save/load models in SafeTensors format
ONNX Export Export to ONNX format
Model Serving REST API serving
Production Deployment Docker, Kubernetes, etc.

API Reference

Core Classes

  • Tensor - Multi-dimensional array abstraction
  • GradTensor - Tensor with gradient tracking
  • TensorOps - Advanced tensor operations ⭐ NEW
  • Module - Base class for neural network components
  • Sequential - Container for stacked modules

Neural Network Modules (118+ classes)

Layers:

  • Linear
  • Conv2d
  • RNN, LSTM, GRU
  • MultiHeadAttention
  • Embedding

Full List: All NN Modules

Loss Functions

  • CrossEntropyLoss
  • MSELoss
  • BCELoss
  • Full List

Optimizers

  • Adam
  • SGD
  • RMSprop
  • Full List

Data & Vision ⭐ NEW

  • Tokenizer
  • VisionTransforms
  • Compose
  • Normalize

Examples

Beginner

  • Hello World - Tensor basics
  • Linear Regression - Simple training
  • MNIST Classification - Neural network classifier

Intermediate

  • MNIST CNN - Convolutional network ⭐ NEW
  • Sentiment Analysis - NLP example
  • Image Classification - Vision example

Advanced

  • Transformer Training - Language model
  • Distributed Training - Multi-GPU
  • Custom Layers - Building extensions

Complete Projects

  • Vision Model - CNN classifier
  • Language Model - GPT-style model
  • Multimodal - Vision + Text
